backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a clearance item tracking system with CRUD operations for managing store clearance items, including types for products, locations, prices, and availability status, plus query functions for filtering by store, category, price range, and location.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: main page display, location-based filtering, filter controls, best deals section, and visual design, mapping them to source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files describing components for clearance item display, filtering, location-based search, and styling with warm amber/terracotta color scheme.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes with warm neutral tones and custom design tokens for borders, shadows, and UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Clearance Tracker application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping the application with ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and rendering MainPage with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/BestDealsSection: Component displaying top 12 clearance items sorted by highest discount percentage in a highlighted gradient container with sparkle icon header.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Checkbox-based filter component for selecting multiple product categories from a predefined list of 10 home improvement categories.
frontend/src/components/ClearanceItemCar: Card component displaying individual clearance item details including store branding, pricing, discount badge, category, location, distance, and availability status with color-coded badges.
frontend/src/components/ClearanceItemsLi: Grid layout component rendering clearance item cards with loading skeleton states and empty state message when no items match filters.
frontend/src/components/FilterPanel.tsx: Composite filter panel combining store, category, price range, and location filters with a clear all button for resetting filter state.
frontend/src/components/LocationFilter.t: React component that provides a location filter UI with city input, US state dropdown, and radius selector (10-100 miles), calling onFilterChange callback when applied.
frontend/src/components/PriceRangeFilter: React component that provides min/max price input fields and applies price range filtering via onFilterChange callback.
frontend/src/components/StoreFilter.tsx: React component with radio buttons to filter by store (both, Home Depot, or Lowe's), calling onChange when selection changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an ICP actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and identity persistence using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks for fetching clearance items (all, by store, by location, by price range) and adding new clearance items via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/MainPage.tsx: Main page component that displays clearance items with filtering by store, category, price, and location, including a responsive filter panel and best deals section.
frontend/src/utils/distanceCalculator.ts: Utility functions for calculating distance between coordinates using Haversine formula and filtering items by maximum distance from a user location.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, Inter font family, custom border radii, box shadows, accordion animations, and includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a clearance item aggregator website for Home Depot and Lowe's, documenting existing features (main page display, location filtering, store/category/price filters, deals section, modern UI design) and pending feature requests for backend data models and API integrations.
